arts.ttl: Aberdeen ex transfer chief delighted to see Pape Gueye come good as due diligence on Hampden hero pays off
arts.sum: The former Pittodrie transfer chief was delighted to see two of his signings star in the semi final victory against the Jambos last weekend

arts.ttl: Celta Vigo star to miss Villarreal clash through injury
arts.sum: A leading member of the defensive ranks at La Liga outfit Celta Vigo will play no part in the club’s upcoming meeting with Villarreal. This comes amid confirmation on the…

Villarreal are pushing to finish in the Champions League places, and their chances have been boosted with fifth place in La Liga qualifying for the competition. Marcelino's side are currently unbeaten...
